Skip to contents
dsVert 1.1.0
  • Reference

Broadcast per-patient cluster IDs to the peer (LMM exact)

Source: R/dsvertLMMClusterBroadcastDS.R
dsvertLMMBroadcastClusterIDsDS.Rd

On the outcome server (which holds the cluster membership column plaintext), encode the cluster IDs as an integer vector and transport-encrypt them to the peer so both DCF parties can compute per-cluster aggregates of their own r / r^2 shares.

This is the documented LMM inter-server leakage tier (cluster-ID membership, see V2_PROGRESS disclosure table). The shared cluster IDs are plaintext between the two DCF parties but NEVER reach the analyst client.

Usage

dsvertLMMBroadcastClusterIDsDS(
  data_name,
  cluster_col,
  peer_pk,
  session_id = NULL
)

Arguments

data_name

Aligned data frame.

cluster_col

Cluster column.

peer_pk

Transport pk of the peer (base64url).

session_id

MPC session id.

Value

list(peer_blob, n_clusters, levels)

On this page
